name: Marcus Chen
post: B2B pivot was the right call. API-first compliance could be the next Stripe for regulation.

messages.content: Strong thesis on compliance infrastructure. Unit economics need work but the regulatory moat is real.

name: Oliver Brooks
post: B2B SaaS model is more palatable. Still need a human oversight layer for edge cases.

messages.content: AI cannot replace human judgment in compliance decisions. Regulators will never trust automated MSB oversight.
messages.post: AI cannot replace human judgment in compliance decisions. Regulators will never trust automated MSB oversight.

name: Alex Rivera
post: Real-time multi-jurisdiction compliance is genuinely novel. Worth watching.

messages.content: Show me the moat. How is this actually different from Chainalysis or ComplyAdvantage?

messages.content: Real-time multi-jurisdiction compliance is genuinely novel. Worth watching.

name: Thomas Weber
post: We already have regulatory approval in 48 states. Good luck catching up in less than 3 years.

messages.content: We already have regulatory approval in 48 states. Good luck catching up in less than 3 years.

name: Director Collins
post: B2B SaaS model avoids most money transmission concerns. Would still need to ensure data handling compliance.

messages.content: MSB registration is mandatory per 31 CFR 1022. No exceptions for AI-powered platforms.
messages.post: MSB registration is mandatory per 31 CFR 1022. No exceptions for AI-powered platforms.

name: Helen Frost
post: SOC 2 Type II roadmap is encouraging. Would need to see audit results before recommending to any banking client.

messages.content: Startups lack enterprise resilience. Banks need bank-grade uptime SLAs and security certifications before vendor onboarding.
messages.post: Startups lack enterprise resilience. Banks need bank-grade uptime SLAs and security certifications before vendor onboarding.

name: Kenji Taniguchi
post: API-first approach could shorten the integration timeline significantly. Still skeptical about AI accuracy for edge cases.

messages.content: Vendor risk assessment at major banks takes 18 months minimum. Enterprise sales cycle will be brutal.
